page: Microsoft Azure NV4as_v4 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the NVSv4 server family. Powered by an AMD processor and virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance features 4 dedicated vCPUs paired with 14.0 GB of system memory, yielding 3.5 GB of RAM per core. The hardware configuration includes a fractional GPU allocation of 0.125 of a physical GPU, alongside 90 GB of local storage. The instance is also Premium Storage capable, though it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

This instance utilizes a partitioned GPU architecture, allowing users to access a fraction of a GPU resource. This fractional GPU allocation provides a cost-effective entry point for workloads that require GPU acceleration but do not demand a full dedicated graphics card. The resource density of 4 vCPUs and 14.0 GB of RAM offers a balanced profile for entry-level accelerated tasks without the overhead of full-scale GPU nodes.

The NV4as_v4 is designed for workloads such as light virtual desktop infrastructure (VDI), basic 3D visualization, single-threaded or lightly threaded GPU-accelerated applications, and development or testing environments that require GPU APIs. It is also suitable for general-purpose tasks that benefit from hardware-accelerated rendering or basic parallel processing.
description: Microsoft Azure NV4as_v4 is an x86_64 virtual machine within the NVSv4 family, running on an AMD processor via Microsoft Hyper-V virtualization. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs, 14.0 GB of system memory, and 90 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. A key differentiator is its fractional GPU allocation of 0.125 of a physical GPU, which provides cost-efficient access to hardware acceleration without the expense of a dedicated graphics card. This resource configuration delivers a balanced 3.5 GB of RAM per core. The instance is designed for workloads such as entry-level virtual desktop infrastructure, light 3D visualization, and development environments requiring GPU API support. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

tagline: An entry-level virtual machine featuring fractional GPU acceleration, dedicated AMD processors, and balanced system memory for light visualization workloads.
